finding: CAS file re-download during linking has no failure handling — no exit code, no retry budget reference.
suggestion: Specify re-download follows Section 11.2 retry policy. If all retries exhausted, exit 3.

finding: Probe creation failure in project root (read-only dir) not addressed.
suggestion: If probe temp dir cannot be created in project root, fall back to 'copy' strategy with warning.

finding: Version normalization algorithm for root entry undefined. Composer normalization is complex.
suggestion: State: use composer.json version verbatim if present, otherwise dev-main. Do not normalize.

finding: The source field from composer.lock is not mentioned — include or exclude?
suggestion: Explicitly state: pass through source from composer.lock if present, omit if absent.

finding: --project-dir flag mentioned in description but absent from algorithm and Section 7.2.
suggestion: Either document fully or remove as post-MVP.

finding: Probe not specified as skipped when --link-strategy or ALLEGRO_LINK_STRATEGY forces a strategy.
suggestion: State: when link strategy is forced, probe is skipped entirely.

finding: ALLEGRO_WORKERS has no documented clamping rule matching --workers [1,32].
suggestion: State same clamping applies to env var.

finding: Special file types (device files, FIFOs, sockets) in archives not addressed.
suggestion: Skip special file types with warning, similar to symlinks.

finding: No same-filesystem verification for atomic swap. Bind mounts could break assumption.
suggestion: Compare device IDs of vendor.allegro.tmp/ and project root before swap.

finding: In-flight downloads on abort: cancel or complete? Partial files cleanup not specified.
suggestion: Cancel via context, delete partial temp files in store/tmp/ before exit.

finding: Flat package names produce single-segment install-path not confirmed.
suggestion: Add note confirming ../{name} for single-segment names.

finding: Per-step timing values not specified as individual or cumulative.
suggestion: Clarify per-step times are wall-clock for that step alone, final is total.

finding: allegro version output format not specified.
xz has no non-tar fallback specified (gzip does).
suggestion: Add same clarification as gzip: treat non-tar stream as extraction failure.
